detailedDifferences.explanation: Fingerprint appears in both training and validation segments because FreshSessionWithWarmup resets _seenFingerprints while warmup still observes pre-split structure, allowing late re-confirmation of the same swing/break/retest on the validation side. Holdout exclusivity (EarlierOccurrenceOwnsFingerprint): validation occurrence is audit-only; AffectsMetrics=false; classification=CrossSegmentOverlapExcludedFromValidation. After exclusivity, metric fingerprint intersection is empty.
